summarySection.summary: Backend developer specializing in Python and FastAPI for scalable services and data-driven applications. Proven expertise in building REST APIs, optimizing data processing, and implementing real-time analytics. Strong background in SQL and PostgreSQL for efficient data management and reporting.

experience.description:
• Developed and maintained backend services and REST APIs using Python and Django, enhancing secure workflows for financial compliance.
• Contributed to system architecture discussions, focusing on scalable service patterns and effective data modeling.
• Created dynamic React dashboards integrated with Django APIs, providing real-time insights into backend data workflows.
• Optimized data-processing pipelines and SQL queries in PostgreSQL, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency and improved system performance.

projects.description:
• Engineered an AI-driven resume platform that automates the parsing of PDF/DOCX files into structured data using FastAPI and PostgreSQL.
• Developed backend services for parsing, authentication, and export workflows, ensuring seamless user experience.
• Implemented a live editing interface in React, allowing real-time customization of resume content.
• Integrated OpenAI API for enhanced content generation and automated resume editing workflows.

• Designed a robust ML data pipeline for real-time sentiment analysis, processing over 1,000 Reddit finance posts per run through a multi-stage ETL process.
• Utilized NLP models (FinBERT) and feature engineering to create over 40 predictive features per ticker, training XGBoost models with 55–70% ROC-AUC.
• Developed modular components for data ingestion and transformation, aligning with message-driven architectures for scalability.
• Automated end-to-end workflows for data collection, preprocessing, and model inference, enabling efficient real-time analytics.
